entries.title: Site Classification by Vs30 (Table 6-1)
entries.text: Site class is based on Vs30 (time-averaged shear-wave velocity in the upper 30 m). Use this table to classify Site Class A-F. For this dashboard, the classification is a proxy and should be confirmed by site-specific investigation.

entries.title: Model Limitations and Use Constraints
entries.text: Predictions are research-grade and intended for screening-level assessment only. Shallow depths (1-5 m) do not replace standard Vs30 measurement. Uncertainty intervals reflect model and data limitations and may not capture all site-specific variability. Always verify with site investigation and a licensed engineer before design or construction.

entries.title: Foundation Requirements (General)
entries.text: Foundation selection should consider site class, groundwater conditions, and settlement/liquefaction potential. For softer sites, consider ground improvement and/or deep foundations subject to geotechnical design. This entry is a placeholder until PDF extraction is completed.
